emails.subject: Heartland and Twister Unwinds
emails.body: Heartland and Twister Unwinds Diane, Heartland Energy Group, Inc. We essentially terminated VU4418.1 and VZ4240.1 on 9/24/01 and paid them $69,200 on 9/26/01 which is in VZ4240.3 Twister Gas Services, LLC This is more complicated. We terminated VL2515.1 and Y05186.2 totally. We partially terminated VN4969.1 (Oct-01 Nov-01 only), VU4647.1 (Oct-01 thru Dec-01 only), and Y05186.1 (Oct-01 thru Dec-01 only). They were terminated on 9/24/01 and they were paid $116,700 on 9/26/01 which is in Y05186.7 I sent a fax to 713-646-2495 of the Termination Agreement they have for a prior deal. They want one similar to this for these two deals. Please call if you have any questions. I appreciate your help. DG 3-9573

emails.subject: FW: Heartland and Twister Unwinds
emails.body: FW: Heartland and Twister Unwinds I don't mean to hound you, but the customer is asking. Any luck on completing this? Please let me know. Thanks DG To: Anderson, Diane

emails.subject: RE: Heartland and Twister Unwinds
emails.body: RE: Heartland and Twister Unwinds Darren, I'm working on them today. I'll let you know when I get them out. To: Anderson, Diane

emails.subject: RE: Heartland and Twister Unwinds
emails.body: RE: Heartland and Twister Unwinds Darren, Just FYI. I've had to pass on the Heartland termination to Richard Deming, who handles Physical deals. I will get the Twister deal out this morning. I've asked Richard to drop you a line when he send out Heartland. Diane To: Anderson, Diane

emails.subject: RE: Heartland and Twister Unwinds
emails.body: Thanks. DG To: Giron, Darron C.

emails.subject: RE: Heartland and Twister Unwinds
emails.body: RE: Heartland and Twister Unwinds Darren, Twister just want to confirm with you...the one payment for this...does that payment correspond to the three partial terminations, or all five (three partial plus two full) Diane To: Anderson, Diane

emails.subject: RE: Heartland and Twister Unwinds
emails.body: RE: Heartland and Twister Unwinds Darron, I have created the Twister termination and will get Fred LaGrasta to sign it this afternoon. (we're not allowed to sign financial terminations down here) Diane PS Richard is having some trouble with the Heartland deal.....he's getting approval from legal on the Termination template (it's a little different on the physical side). FYI. To: Anderson, Diane

emails.subject: RE: Heartland and Twister Unwinds
emails.body: I was out of the office Thurs Fri. For Twister, the payment we made on 9/26 ($116,700) corresponds to all five (three partial and two full) terminations. DG To: Giron, Darron C.

emails.subject: RE: Heartland and Twister Unwinds
emails.body: Thanks. Did you get it signed? DG To: Giron, Darron C.
